title: Lesser & Pavey Highland Cow Doorstop for Home & Office | Decorative Door Stopper for All Rooms | Lovely Door Stop for Everyday Use | Ideal Door Wedges Indoors for Floor
features: DECORATIVE DOORSTOP FOR HOME & OFFICE: The Lesser & Pavey William Morris Fruit Doorstop is an ideal door stopper for your home & office. It serves as both a decorative door stopper and a practical solution to keep doors open or closed. Perfect as door wedges indoors, especially for floor use.

VERSATILE DOOR WEDGES INDOORS: The Bessy The Basset Doorstop offers both functionality and charm. This rubber door stopper is perfect for floor use, making it an essential addition to any room. Keep your doors in place while adding a lovely decorative touch to your home or office.

PERFECT FOR EVERYDAY USE: The Jacky The Jack Russel Doorstop is a great door stopper that is designed to handle heavy doors. Made with rubber, it's a door stopper for walls or floors, ideal for doorstops for floor use, keeping your doors securely open or closed.

IDEAL FOR ALL ROOMS: Add a whimsical touch to your home or office with the Chloe The Corgi Doorstop. This charming door stopper makes it easy to keep doors in place. The perfect door wedges indoors, it's a versatile and durable accessory for every room, including heavy door stops.

STYLISH & PRACTICAL DOOR STOP: The Daisy The Dachshund Doorstop is an excellent addition to any room, offering both style and functionality. This door stopper is ideal for preventing door damage and works great as a door wedge indoors for floor use or as a door stopper for walls.
